scanner_description: GDPR, CCPA, and app-store compliance checks — PII in logs, analytics without consent, tracking pixels without gates, cookies without banners, missing privacy policy references, Apple ATT, Google Data Safety.

rules.name: PII Logged to Console
rules.note: Personally identifiable information (PII) is being logged. Log aggregation services store this data permanently, creating GDPR/CCPA liability.
rules.remediation: Remove PII from log statements. Use structured logging with automatic PII redaction.

rules.name: PII Sent to Logger
rules.note: Personally identifiable information sent to structured logger. Log aggregation services store this permanently, creating GDPR/CCPA liability.
rules.remediation: Remove PII from log statements. Use structured logging with automatic PII redaction.

rules.name: PII in Print Statement
rules.note: PII in print statement — the output may be captured by log collectors, terminal history, or stdout redirection. GDPR/CCPA liability.
rules.remediation: Remove PII from print statements. Use structured logging with redaction.

rules.name: Analytics Loaded Without Consent Check
rules.note: Analytics library initialized without any visible consent mechanism. GDPR requires explicit consent before tracking. CCPA requires opt-out capability.
rules.remediation: Implement a consent banner. Only initialize analytics after user consents. Use a consent management platform or build a simple cookie consent flow.

rules.name: Tracking Pixel Loaded Without Consent
rules.note: Tracking pixel loaded without consent gate. Violates GDPR Art. 6 (lawful basis) and ePrivacy directive.
rules.remediation: Conditionally load tracking pixels only after user consent is obtained.

rules.name: PII in URL Parameters
rules.note: Email, phone, or user ID passed as URL query parameters. URLs are logged by servers, proxies, browsers, and analytics — PII exposure.
rules.remediation: Pass PII in request body (POST) or headers, never in URL parameters.

rules.name: Cookies Set Without Consent Banner
rules.note: Cookies are being set without any visible consent mechanism. EU ePrivacy directive and GDPR require informed consent for non-essential cookies.
rules.remediation: Implement a cookie consent banner that blocks non-essential cookies until user accepts.

rules.name: No Privacy Policy Link Detected
rules.note: No reference to a privacy policy found in the main application layout. Privacy policies are legally required by GDPR, CCPA, and app stores.
rules.remediation: Add a link to your privacy policy in the footer or settings page.

rules.name: PII in Error Tracking Context
rules.note: User PII attached to error tracker reports. Error tracking services store this data, creating a PII liability outside your control.
rules.remediation: Scrub PII from error tracker context. Most services support beforeSend hooks for data sanitization.

rules.name: No Data Retention/Deletion Strategy
rules.note: Database schema tracks creation time but has no deletion/expiry mechanism. GDPR requires data minimization and right to erasure.
rules.remediation: Add soft-delete columns (deleted_at), TTL/expiry fields, or implement a data retention policy with automated cleanup.

rules.name: CCPA: No 'Do Not Sell' Mechanism
rules.note: CCPA referenced but no 'Do Not Sell My Personal Information' link found. Required for California users.
rules.remediation: Add a 'Do Not Sell My Personal Information' link accessible from every page.

rules.name: Apple ATT Not Implemented
rules.note: AdSupport framework imported but App Tracking Transparency prompt not implemented. Apple will reject the app.
rules.remediation: Import AppTrackingTransparency and call ATTrackingManager.requestTrackingAuthorization() before accessing IDFA.

rules.name: Sensitive Android Permission — Data Safety Required
rules.note: AndroidManifest requests sensitive permissions but no data safety section configured. Google Play requires Data Safety declarations for all data collection.
rules.remediation: Complete the Data Safety form in Google Play Console for each data type collected.
